recommended_actions.action: Investigate duplicate records. Add dedup logic keyed on non-key fields.
Fix null values in required column 'merchant_id' at the source.
Investigate root cause of fee_revenue discrepancy for 2025-12. Check for duplicate events, missing data, or filter logic differences.

top_risks.business_impact: Duplicate records inflate aggregations and distort metrics
top_risks.title: Near-duplicate rows detected

top_risks.business_impact: Null values in required fields break filters and aggregations
top_risks.title: Null values in required column: merchant_id

top_risks.business_impact: Reported fee_revenue for 2025-12 is 299,461, but recomputed value from raw events is 274,383. Discrepancy of +8.4%.
top_risks.title: fee_revenue misreported for 2025-12 (off by +8.4%)

executive_summary: In this illustrative example, BayesIQ audits a fintech company's transaction fee revenue pipeline across merchant reconciliation, fee calculations, and regulatory reporting. The audit identifies 3 findings — including 54 near-duplicate transaction records, null merchant IDs breaking downstream aggregations, and an 8.4% fee revenue overstatement constituting a material misstatement. After remediation, the reliability score improves from 33 to 81.
